report.summary: UX audit of 4 key pages, fixed Bridge Aggregator input validation & accessibility, added mobile scroll indicators to EcosystemStore, and wired OG metadata for 6 high-traffic pages.

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: Bridge Aggregator: missing input min/max validation, no aria-expanded on expandable sections, swap button lacks aria-label, security grid not responsive on mobile
Ecosystem Store: horizontal scrollable sections (tabs, featured strip) have hidden scrollbars with no visual indicator on mobile
Homepage: carousel sections not optimized for mobile, tools grid cramped at small breakpoints
Learn Hub: guide cards missing aria-labels on links, no keyboard focus indicators

sections.title: UX Improvements Implemented
items: Bridge Aggregator: added min=10/max=1000000 HTML attributes on amount input with aria-describedby
Bridge Aggregator: added aria-label to swap chains button for screen readers
Bridge Aggregator: added aria-expanded + aria-label to all expandable bridge detail sections, chevrons now aria-hidden
Bridge Aggregator: added useEffect to prevent same source/destination chain selection
Bridge Aggregator: security tab grid now responsive (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3)
Bridge Aggregator: removed non-functional inline meta tags from client component
Ecosystem Store: added gradient fade masks on EcosystemTabs scroll area (mobile only)
Ecosystem Store: added gradient fade masks on FeaturedStrip scroll area (mobile only)

sections.title: OG Images & Metadata Wired
items: Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /tools/bridge-aggregator (1200x630, type=tool)
Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /tools/dca-calculator (1200x630, type=tool)
Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /tools/gas-tracker (1200x630, type=tool)
Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /tools/defi-yields (1200x630, type=tool)
Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /tools/portfolio-tracker (1200x630, type=tool)
Created layout.tsx with OG metadata: /ecosystem (1200x630, type=page)
All 6 pages now generate dynamic OG images via /api/og endpoint instead of generic fallback

sections.title: Verification
items: TypeScript check passed: 0 errors in modified files (bridge-aggregator, EcosystemStore, all layout.tsx)
Full build blocked by pre-existing OOM/bus error (unrelated to changes)
Pre-existing TS errors in AICourseRecommendations.tsx (unescaped quotes) — not introduced by this cycle
